## Budget Implications

### Current Payroll

```
[Team 1] (6 people):   $[Amount]/year
[Team 2] (4 people):   $[Amount]/year
[Team 3] (3 people):   $[Amount]/year
──────────────────────────────
Total Base:            $[Amount]/year
```

### Proposed Hiring (New)

```
[Role] (Contract):     $[Amount]/month x [Duration]
[Role] (Full-time):    $[Amount]/year
──────────────────────────────
Additional Cost:       $[Amount]/year
```

### New Total with Hiring

```
Current:    $[Amount]/year
New:        $[Amount]/year (+[X]% growth)
```

**Budget Status**: ✅ Within budget / ⚠️ At limit / 🔴 Over budget

   - Cost: None
   - Timeline: [Duration]

   - Benefit: Better code, knowledge transfer
   - Cost: [N] hours/week
   - Timeline: Ongoing

3. **Automation/Tools**
   - Benefit: Save [N] hours/week

## Monthly Review Cycle

### Weekly (Every Friday)

- [ ] Team leads check utilization
- [ ] Flag new capacity needs
- [ ] Identify bottlenecks

### Monthly (Last Friday)

- [ ] Full allocation review
- [ ] Update capacity forecasts
- [ ] Plan staffing adjustments
- [ ] Update this document

### Quarterly (End of Q)

- [ ] Strategic capacity planning
- [ ] Hiring/budget planning
- [ ] Team feedback review
- [ ] Burnout risk assessment
